title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers outlines five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations in agent systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, graph RAG for precise multi-hop queries, multi-agent validation for response verification, symbolic guardrails via Python code hooks, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrations use Strands Agents framework with 85% token reduction in filtering examples.
